creator: Yabsera Kebede

product_summary.what_it_is: A live, AI-powered website builder. The user types a plain-text brief, NovaMotion engineers a design system, assembles cinematic sections, and ships a fully animated single-file website in seconds.
product_summary.vibe: Dark kinetic brutalism — #0e0e0e base, #ff4500 orange accent, zero border-radius, Space Grotesk headlines, JetBrains Mono terminal details.

tools_orchestrated.how: Defined the kinetic-brutalist palette, typography pairing, motion tokens, and component vocabulary (cards, buttons, terminal, badges). Every section inherits its tokens.
MCP installed and callable. Not invoked for this build because the design direction was already defined. Ready for any user brief that supplies a reference URL.

The hero pattern (giant kinetic headline, gradient wordmark, glow orbs, scan lines, floating geometric shards) is aligned with 21st.dev's hero library. Same layout contract, hand-tuned to the brutalist tokens.
MCP installed. Not invoked for this build because the nine sections were hand-assembled to stay pixel-faithful to the design tokens. Ready to generate additional screens on demand.

tools_orchestrated.tool: Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview via infsh)
tools_orchestrated.how: Replaced every placeholder/SVG mockup with real cinematic imagery. Generated: 1 hero backdrop, 6 gallery-card website mockups, 3 editorial testimonial portraits (Alex R., Priya K., Jordan M.), 4 cinematic section parallax backdrops (about, how-it-works, builder, contact CTA), 3 about bento-card visuals (brief-to-beauty wireframe, neural assembly circuit, ships-animated light trails), and 1 features image-generation strip — all resized to lean JPEGs (37KB–523KB) for fast loads. No fallback to flat SVGs.

tools_orchestrated.role: LIVE generation engine — makes the builder alive
tools_orchestrated.how: When a user types a brief and hits Launch Engine, script.js posts the brief plus a strict HTML-output system prompt to Pollinations. The model returns a complete single-file HTML document which renders in the preview iframe. The system prompt is engineered to rival Emergent.sh / Framer / Webflow output — it demands 8–11 sections, a custom 5-color palette, cinematic font pairings (Space Grotesk + Inter, Fraunces + DM Sans, Bricolage + Geist, Bebas + Manrope), modern CSS effects (gradient text, glassmorphism, mesh gradients, grain overlays), 6–10 AI Pollinations images, full interactivity (hamburger nav, lightbox modals, working forms with validation, smooth scroll, keyboard support), cinematic animations (hero word-stagger, IntersectionObserver reveals, count-up stats, parallax, signature animated element), and 700–1500 lines / 50–110KB density. A post-processor (_forcePollinationsImages) then enforces the contract: rewrites every to a Pollinations Flux URL, kills emoji-as-icon placeholders via a 50-entry emoji-to-photo map, and injects a hero image if fewer than 3 images are present. Every produced website ships with fully bespoke AI imagery tailored to the brief — no Unsplash, no placeholders, no emoji icons. If the text API is ever unavailable, the in-browser SiteGenerator template engine takes over as fallback so the builder never breaks.

sections_assembled.notes: Sticky, blur + shadow on scroll. Logo, 4 links, Launch CTA.
Full-viewport, AI-generated backdrop + glow orbs + floating shards. Headline 'Build Websites That Move.' with kinetic-gradient word, 2 CTAs, status bar.
Dark split: engine description + mini terminal log of the assembly process.
3-step flow (Brief -> Engineer -> Ship) with stat strip: 0.4s assembly, 99/100 Lighthouse, infinite motion layers, Active CDN.
Feature cards covering design tokens, scroll reveals, type systems, responsive, deploy pipeline.
6 'Built with NovaMotion' concepts — PulseMetrics, Verdant Studio, Ignition Studio, NexusAI, Orbital API, GoldForge — each card uses a nano-banana-2 generated image.
3 testimonials (Alex R. / Priya K. / Jordan M.) with role labels.
LIVE builder — textarea for brief, animated terminal log, progress bar, preview iframe, download HTML. Calls Pollinations AI. Saves projects to localStorage when logged in.
Closing CTA with stats (10K+ sites, 99% uptime, 4.9 stars) and newsletter field.

animations: Cinematic viewport-anchored parallax on 6 section backdrops (hero 0.35x, about 0.18x, how 0.20x, builder 0.15x, contact 0.25x) plus 5 floating shards at -0.4x to +0.5x — GPU-accelerated translate3d, rAF-throttled, IntersectionObserver culled, offsets cached on resize, prefers-reduced-motion honored
Hero headline reveal on load with staggered sub-elements (reveal-delay-1/2/3 chain)
IntersectionObserver scroll-reveals on every section (threshold 0.15, once)
Gallery cards: hover lift -6px + glow, mousemove parallax tilt
Navbar blur + shadow appear after 80px scroll
Glow orbs pulse, scan line sweeps, floating shards drift (float-a/b/c keyframes)
Builder terminal log types line-by-line with progress bar
prefers-reduced-motion disables all transforms and animations

tech_stack.js: script.js — NovaAuth (localStorage login), NovaProjects (max 20 saved), NovaBuilder (orchestrator), SiteGenerator (fallback template engine)
tech_stack.css: Tailwind CDN + scoped <style> block with CSS custom properties
tech_stack.fonts: Google Fonts — Space Grotesk, Inter, JetBrains Mono
tech_stack.build_step: none — open index.html or deploy the folder to any static host

generated_site_quality.benchmark: Emergent.sh / Framer / Webflow / top Awwwards entries
system_prompt_demands: 8–11 sections always (navbar, hero, trust strip, features, about, showcase, pricing/comparison, testimonials, FAQ, contact, footer)
Cinematic font pairing from Google Fonts (Space Grotesk+Inter / Fraunces+DM Sans / Bricolage+Geist / Bebas+Manrope)
Modern CSS effects: gradient text, glassmorphism, mesh gradients, grain overlays, soft glows
6–10 AI-generated Pollinations Flux images with bespoke per-section prompts
Full interactivity: hamburger nav, lightbox, working forms with validation, smooth scroll, Escape-to-close, keyboard support
Cinematic animations: hero word-stagger, IntersectionObserver reveals, count-up stats, hero parallax, signature animated element
Mobile-first responsive at 375px / sm / lg / xl
post_processor_safety_net: Rewrites every src to a Pollinations Flux URL (preserving alt as prompt)
Kills emoji-as-icon placeholders via 50-entry emoji-to-photo map (PASS A: emoji wrapped in tag → AI image; PASS B: standalone emoji → AI image)
Injects hero image if document has fewer than 3 images
Cache-busted via script.js?v=6 to defeat browser cache
